hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json;$c=$d.tool_input.command;if($c-match '(?i)(scoop|winget|choco)\s+install|(apt(-get)?|brew)\s+install'){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext='Package install detected. Add it to the dotfiles package list: windows/install/scoop.txt, winget.txt, or choco.txt (Windows) / linux/install/apt.txt or brew.txt (Linux).'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}"
pwsh -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'Claudeが入力を待っています' -Sound Default"
pwsh -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'タスクが完了しました' -Sound Default"
